creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thank you Fynn.

Please:

1) Set maintainer-approval to + on attachments for ports you are maintainer of. Attachment -> Details -> maintainer-approval [+]

2) Confirm this change passes QA (portlint, poudriere). For more information see: https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/porters-handbook/testing.html
